title: LowVolumeRain
description: Decreases the volume of the rain sfx.
body:
Decreases the volume of the rain sfx ingame.  
For those who dislike the incredibly loud sound!  
  
Needs **Babric**.  

### How to change volume
> **1.1 and latest** → Go to `.minecraft/config/lowrain.properties`
 and change the value there! Default: `0.025`  
> **1.0.1** → Cycle through a set of volumes using F3 + U ingame.
